name: Witte Huis
historic_note: Europe's tallest office building at time of completion

facade.base: Two-storey hard stone facade with columns (different from white brick above)

corner_towers.description: Small turrets at corners rising above main roofline

mansard_roof.description: Steeply sloping roof containing top 3 floors, building narrows toward top

decorative_elements: Floral motifs and curved lines on facade
Wrought-iron lamp hooks with floral motifs
Rounded corner windows with dragon reliefs
Wrought-iron railings and decorative window frames

interior_walls.description: Two thick load-bearing walls (40 to 140 cm thick)

colors.decorations: Stone grey with iron black accents

block_palette.mansard_roof: Dark grey concrete or deepslate tiles
block_palette.windows: Glass panes (5-6 per face per floor)

minecraft_suggestions.build_notes: Three visual zones bottom-to-top: stone base (2 floors) → white brick (5-6 floors) → tapering mansard roof (3 floors) → corner turrets.
